UserPreference.title: User Preference
UserPreference.description: Preferences for a specific user, including creator name and assistant settings.

creatorName.description: The name of the creator (e.g., Atharv).

preferredTitle.description: How the user wants to be addressed (e.g., Sir).

isMuted.description: Whether the assistant is muted by default.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: Feedback for a specific response from the assistant.

messageId.description: The unique ID of the message being rated.

userId.description: The ID of the user providing the feedback.

rating.description: The rating (up for positive, down for negative).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the feedback was provided.

responseText.description: The text of the response being rated.

userPrompt.description: The user prompt that generated this response.
